description: Portrait-format graphic combining a photograph with a text band. The photo shows Donald Trump standing at a podium fitted with a microphone, wearing a dark navy suit with a purple tie and a U.S. flag lapel pin, looking toward the camera. Behind him stand two men in dark suits (one with a red tie). A U.S. flag and a circular seal emblem are partly visible at the edges. The lower portion has a dark gradient band carrying a small gold pill-shaped label reading 'PRESIDENTIAL ACTIONS' and a large white headline: 'TrumpRx Adds 600+ New Medications, Delivering on Promise to Put American Patients First.' The White House wordmark with a building icon ('The WHITE HOUSE') appears at the bottom.
notable_text: PRESIDENTIAL ACTIONS | TrumpRx Adds 600+ New Medications, Delivering on Promise to Put American Patients First | The WHITE HOUSE
